summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MKEpulse full-stack Milwaukee events platform. All backend APIs working (16/16 passed). Frontend authentication, admin portal, user onboarding, and core features functional. Milwaukee Brewers design theme implemented correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Some pages show 'Loading...' states longer than expected

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@mkepulse.com / MKEadmin2026!)
User registration and JWT token generation
Feed endpoint returns 8 events with proper data structure
Parking endpoint returns 6 garages with availability data
Admin dashboard with stats (4 users, $4.14 MRR, 4 live events, 476 parking spots)
Admin navigation to Users, Events, Alerts, Parking, Revenue pages
User onboarding quiz 6-step flow (Step 1 of 6 confirmed)
Feed page displays event cards with proper formatting
Map page loads with Leaflet integration
User navigation between Feed, Map, Parking, Alerts pages
Milwaukee Brewers design theme (navy, gold, cream colors)

success_percentage.integration: 100% (all auth flows and API integrations working)
